title: SHA-256 fingerprint helper
definition_of_done: Fingerprint([]byte) returns lowercase hex SHA-256; TestFingerprint* passes
outcome: Fingerprint([]byte) string in internal/sources/fingerprint.go; TestFingerprintKnownValue and TestFingerprintDifferentInputs pass

notes.msg: Implemented Fingerprint([]byte) string in internal/sources/fingerprint.go using crypto/sha256 and encoding/hex. Added TestFingerprintKnownValue and TestFingerprintDifferentInputs in fingerprint_test.go. All tests pass (go test ./internal/sources/...) and go build ./... succeeds.
